title: Breaking Waves as Categorification Events

analysis.object: T560: Breaking Waves as Categorification Events depth analysis

open_ocean_eml3.description: Open ocean wave: EML-3 oscillatory; sinusoidal, bounded, energy conserved
open_ocean_eml3.reason: Deep water wave is EML-3: linear wave equation, no breaking

shoaling_steepening.description: Wave approaches shore: shoals, steepens; EML-3 becomes nonlinear
shoaling_steepening.reason: Shoaling is EML-3 nonlinear amplification; still finite depth

breaking_emlinf.description: Wave breaks: EML-3 -> EML-inf; white water, turbulent, unpredictable
breaking_emlinf.reason: Wave breaking is categorification: EML-3 crest -> EML-inf turbulent bore

surfer_boundary.description: Surfer rides boundary between EML-3 (face of wave) and EML-inf (breaking lip)
surfer_boundary.reason: Surfing is the human activity of riding the EML-3/EML-inf boundary

analysis.theorem: T560: Breaking Waves as Categorification Events (S839).

key_theorem: T560: Breaking Waves as Categorification Events (S839).
